mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( auction_idx, bid_idx, buyer_idx, seller_idx, order_amount, order_status, is_settled ) VALUES ( #{auctionIdx}, #{bidIdx}, #{buyerIdx}, #{sellerIdx}, #{orderAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{isSettled} )
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'PAID', paid_at = CASE WHEN paid_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE paid_at END WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status IN ('CREATED', 'PAID')
UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'SHIPPED', shipped_at = CASE WHEN shipped_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE shipped_at END WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED')

UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_at = CASE WHEN confirmed_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE confirmed_at END, is_settled = 'Y' WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status IN ('SHIPPED', 'CONFIRMED')

UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'CANCELED', refund_at = CASE WHEN refund_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE refund_at END, is_settled = 'N' WHERE order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND order_status IN ('CREATED', 'PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'CANCELED')
mapper.sql: o.order_idx AS orderIdx, o.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, o.bid_idx AS bidIdx, o.buyer_idx AS buyerIdx, o.seller_idx AS sellerIdx, o.order_amount AS orderAmount, o.order_status AS orderStatusCode, CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'CREATED' THEN '결제대기' WHEN o.order_status = 'PAID' THEN '결제완료' WHEN o.order_status = 'SHIPPED' THEN '배송중' WHEN o.order_status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN '구매확정' WHEN o.order_status = 'CANCELED' THEN '취소' ELSE o.order_status END AS orderStatusName, o.is_settled AS isSettled, o.order_regdate AS orderRegdate, o.paid_at AS paidAt, o.shipped_at AS shippedAt, o.confirmed_at AS confirmedAt, o.refund_at AS refundAt, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, bm.mem_id AS buyerMemId, sm.mem_id AS sellerMemId, COALESCE(bp.mem_nickname, bm.mem_id) AS buyerNickname, COALESCE(sp.mem_nickname, sm.mem_id) AS sellerNickname, d.courier_company AS courierCompany, d.tracking_number AS trackingNumber, r.review_idx AS reviewIdx, COALESCE(p.pay_status, 'READY') AS paymentStatusCode, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.pay_status, 'READY') = 'READY' THEN '결제대기' WHEN p.pay_status = 'DONE' THEN '결제완료' WHEN p.pay_status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN '구매확정' WHEN p.pay_status = 'CANCELED' THEN '결제취소' WHEN p.pay_status = 'EXPIRED' THEN '만료' ELSE COALESCE(p.pay_status, 'READY') END AS paymentStatusName, COALESCE(d.delivery_status, 'READY') AS shippingStatusCode, CASE WHEN COALESCE(d.delivery_status, 'READY') = 'READY' THEN '배송전' WHEN d.delivery_status = 'SHIPPING' THEN '배송중' WHEN d.delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN '배송완료' ELSE COALESCE(d.delivery_status, 'READY') END AS shippingStatusName

FROM orders o INNER JOIN auction a ON a.auction_idx = o.auction_idx INNER JOIN bid b ON b.bid_idx = o.bid_idx INNER JOIN item i ON i.item_idx = b.item_idx INNER JOIN member bm ON bm.mem_idx = o.buyer_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile bp ON bp.mem_idx = bm.mem_idx INNER JOIN member sm ON sm.mem_idx = o.seller_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile sp ON sp.mem_idx = sm.mem_idx LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.pay_idx = ( SELECT MAX(p2.pay_idx) FROM payment p2 WHERE p2.bid_idx = o.bid_idx ) LEFT JOIN delivery d ON d.delivery_idx = ( SELECT MAX(d2.delivery_idx) FROM delivery d2 WHERE d2.bid_idx = o.bid_idx ) LEFT JOIN review r ON r.bid_idx = o.bid_idx AND r.review_is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.select:
SELECT , 'BUYER' AS userRole
WHERE o.buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} ORDER BY o.order_regdate DESC

SELECT , 'SELLER' AS userRole
WHERE o.seller_idx = #{sellerIdx} ORDER BY o.order_regdate DESC

SELECT , CASE WHEN o.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} AND o.seller_idx = #{memIdx} THEN 'BOTH' WHEN o.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} THEN 'BUYER' ELSE 'SELLER' END AS userRole
WHERE o.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} OR o.seller_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY o.order_regdate DESC

SELECT , CASE WHEN o.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} AND o.seller_idx = #{memIdx} THEN 'BOTH' WHEN o.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} THEN 'BUYER' ELSE 'SELLER' END AS userRole
WHERE o.order_idx = #{orderIdx} AND (o.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} OR o.seller_idx = #{memIdx}) LIMIT 1
